2026-05-13.patch_summary: This patch adds a KUnit test suite for the augmented-rbtree IOVA allocator. The test suite includes various test cases to verify the correctness of the allocator, including domain lifecycle, allocation and deallocation, alignment, and invariant checks. The tests are designed to catch any sequencing bugs in the insert, erase, rotate, and propagate operations. The patch also adds a helper function to verify invariants during and after each test run.
